title: coryanthes selbyana
intro: Coryanthes selbyana, also known as the "Queen of the Andes," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Coryanthes selbyana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially aiding in the management of certain diseases. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health ailments.
